title: zanthoxylum bungeanum var. pubescens
intro: Zanthoxylum bungeanum var. pubescens, also known as the pubescent Chinese prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Zanthoxylum bungeanum var. pubescens include relief from pain and fever, as well as the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used as a powder in traditional Chinese medicine.
